summary: First-finish smoke test on Maintyn app. Backend auth/stats/flats endpoints and frontend login+navigation+flat-creation flow all pass. Self-registration as resident works.
passed: Backend POST /api/auth/login with admin@maintyn.app returns 200 + access_token
Backend GET /api/stats returns aggregated stats (total_flats=4, unpaid=5, etc.)
Backend GET /api/flats returns list with residents embedded
Backend POST /api/auth/register creates new user with role=resident and returns access_token
Frontend /login → dashboard redirect works via Bearer token in localStorage
Dashboard renders admin stats cards (flats, collected, pending, expenses, complaints, visitors, notices)
Sidebar navigation works for nav-flats, nav-invoices, nav-complaints, nav-announcements, nav-visitors
Add-flat modal opens; Z-999 flat created and visible in list (integration end-to-end)
action_items: Minor a11y: DialogContent missing aria-describedby (console warning, non-blocking) — safe to defer to full QA.
